    • Method Detail

      • match

        public MatchConditions match(Term subst,
                    MatchConditions mc,
                    Services services)
        Description copied from class: Instruction
        tries to match the schema variable of this instruction with the specified Term instantiationCandidate w.r.t. the given constraints by MatchConditions
        Specified by:
        match in class Instruction<ModalOperatorSV>
        Parameters:
        subst - the Term to be matched
        mc - the MatchConditions with additional constraints (e.g. previous matches of this schemavariable)
        services - the Services
        Returns:
        null if no matches have been found or the new MatchConditions with the pair (sv, instantiationCandidate) added

      • match

        public MatchConditions match(TermNavigator termPosition,
                    MatchConditions mc,
                    Services services)
